name: Ubiquiti AI Port
title: Ubiquiti AI Port
short_description: Ubiquiti AI Port – AI-Powered Video Analytics, Seamless Integration
description: The Ubiquiti AI Port (UP-AI-Port) is an advanced AI appliance designed to enhance surveillance systems with cutting-edge artificial intelligence capabilities. It seamlessly integrates with UniFi and third-party cameras, enabling AI-powered detection, classification, and recognition features.

detailed_description.heading: AI-Powered Video Analytics
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti AI Port (UP-AI-Port) is an advanced AI appliance designed to enhance surveillance systems with cutting-edge artificial intelligence capabilities. It seamlessly integrates with UniFi and third-party cameras, enabling AI-powered detection, classification, and recognition features. The UP-AI-Port is built for real-time performance, featuring a compact yet powerful design. It supports a wide range of AI tasks, including facial recognition and license plate detection, with minimal latency. Equipped with a powerful processor and deep learning algorithms, the AI Port can identify humans, vehicles, and specific objects, ensuring precise event tracking and reducing false alarms. Its robust analytics capabilities are ideal for applications requiring advanced security monitoring, such as commercial properties, transportation hubs, and public spaces.

detailed_description.heading: Seamless Integration
detailed_description.text: Designed for flexibility, the AI Port integrates effortlessly into existing surveillance setups, whether using UniFi or third-party cameras. It supports a centralized management interface via the UniFi Protect application, allowing administrators to configure, monitor, and analyze data from a unified dashboard. The AI Port's scalable design makes it suitable for both small and large deployments, enabling businesses to upgrade their security infrastructure incrementally. The device connects to networks and cameras via high-speed Ethernet, ensuring reliable data transmission and smooth operation. Its ability to process high-definition video streams enhances situational awareness, making it suitable for demanding security environments. With efficient power consumption and support for PoE, the AI Port simplifies installation and reduces the need for additional hardware infrastructure.
